art_direction.depth_structure: Tri-Planar Parallax: Z-axis layering with Background (0.2x), Midground (0.5x), and Foreground (1.0x) translation relative to scroll position.
art_direction.interaction_state_model: Bioluminescent Feedback: Hover states trigger a glow-bleed (box-shadow) and subtle scale-up (1.02x). Active states shift colors from Green to Cyan.
art_direction.motion_language: Organic Precision: Smooth, eased-out cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) transitions. Elements float with a low-frequency sine-wave oscillation to mimic fluid suspension.
art_direction.palette: Cyber-Organic 2026: Deep Obsidian (#050A0C), Bioluminescent Green (#39FF14), Iridescent Purple (#B026FF), Cyan Glaze (#00F3FF), and muted Slate Gray (#2D3436).
art_direction.reduced_motion_version: Static-Positioning: All parallax offsets are neutralized to 0; oscillation is disabled; fade-ins are replaced by immediate visibility; sliders trigger instant state updates.
art_direction.responsive_strategy: Adaptive Columnar: 3-column data grid on desktop, collapsing to a single vertical stream on mobile with scaled-down typography and touch-optimized slider handles.
art_direction.scroll_narrative: Layered Revelation: Content fades in via opacity and vertical translation as it enters the viewport, synced with a multi-speed parallax background.
art_direction.spacing_strategy: Fluid 8pt grid with exaggerated whitespace (padding: 2rem to 5rem) to create a gallery-like aether around data modules.
art_direction.static_fallback: Flat Data-Dashboard: Fixed layout with high-contrast borders; all interactive simulations are replaced by static side-by-side comparison diagrams and text descriptions.
art_direction.texture_language: Glassmorphism & Digital Grain: Frosted semi-transparent overlays (backdrop-filter: blur) combined with a subtle noise overlay to mimic a high-tech monitor.
art_direction.transition_grammar: Cross-fade and Slide: State changes occur via 300ms opacity blends and 400ms directional slides for sequence updates.
art_direction.typography: Headings: Geometric Sans-Serif (Inter or Montserrat) with wide tracking. Body: Monospace (JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono) for a data-centric, technical feel.

content_requirements: Title text: 'The DNA Archive: Digitalized Life'
Bioluminescent Green and Cyan Glaze accents
Bioluminescent Green and Iridescent Purple color accents
Low-frequency sine-wave oscillation for floating elements
Base pair to mRNA mapping display
Visual demonstration of DNA double helix splitting
Illustration of parent strands serving as templates
Visual representation of new complementary strand synthesis

components.purpose: Cyber-Organic header with the title 'The DNA Archive: Digitalized Life'
Parallax-driven background layers for depth and visual atmosphere
Nucleotide sequence data-grid for viewing base pairs
Interactive transcription simulator with sequence scrubbing slider
Visual guide explaining semi-conservative DNA replication
Informational section for mRNA transcription and genetic factoids

description: Create a single self-contained webpage about the wonders of DNA. Make it eye-catching, modern and artistic, with rich motion, parallax-like depth, animated scrolling effects, replication and transcription explained visually, and a vibrant 2026 visual design. It must respect prefers-reduced-motion and work as a local HTML file.
